signals.name: Seasonality
signals.label: Slightly Bullish
signals.explanation: Early Cooling season. AC demand building, but weaker driver than heating — Slightly Bullish.

signals.name: Weather Short-Term
signals.label: Bearish
signals.explanation: Short-term demand sum (days 1–7) vs 5-year average: -20.4%. Position in 5y range: 22% of 5y range. Range position determines whether bearish signal is full (+1) or partial (+0.5).

signals.name: Weather Long-Term
signals.label: Slightly Bullish
signals.explanation: Forward demand sum (days 8–16) vs 5-year average: +51.3%. GFS at this horizon has significantly lower accuracy — only extreme signals count. Demand projects above all 5y observations — if verified, strongly bullish.

signals.name: Storage
signals.label: Slightly Bullish
signals.detail: Now +153 Bcf · above 5y midpoint · slope -24 Bcf/wk · +21D +71 Bcf (above 5y midpoint)
signals.explanation: Storage deviation vs 5y avg: +153 Bcf, above 5y midpoint (5y: 2095–3045 Bcf). Trend slope: -24 Bcf/week. Signal combines range position (where we are vs 5y history) + slope (direction and speed) + crossover within 21D.

signals.name: Fair Price vs Front
signals.label: Slightly Bearish
signals.explanation: Fair price $2.958, band $2.46–$3.46 (±$0.50). Front $3.198 is inside band. Thresholds adapt to season.

signals.name: Fair Price vs Next
signals.label: Slightly Bearish
signals.explanation: Fair price $2.958, band $2.46–$3.46 (±$0.50). Next $3.247 is inside band. Same logic as vs Front.

signals.name: MM Net Positioning
signals.label: Bullish
signals.explanation: Managed Money net position in the 5-year trailing distribution. ≤15th percentile (extreme net-short) = contra-bullish signal. ≥85th = contra-bearish. Between = Neutral. Extreme positioning historically precedes reversals.
